chain_edges.notes: Hyperscaler-lab codesign regime extends naturally to robot training consolidating on the same hyperscaler infrastructure.
Training-vs-inference SKU split underpins the 'robot as moving compute endpoint' framing: training centralizes, inference decentralizes.

relations.notes: Both reflect cloud-side training consolidation with edge-side inference; robotics is a domain instance of the silicon SKU split.
Hyperscaler consolidation theme: lab-cloud-chip exclusives parallel robot-training-cloud consolidation.
Different workload class choices: coding agents go local-first; robot training stays cloud-consolidated.
Robot-as-SaaS extends the AI-SaaS enterprise contract surface that OAuth-trust risk also targets.
